meaning: vi.搏动,跳动,有规律的跳动
examples: Flashes pulsate as he poses with a giant cardboard check for around $3.4 million.
Through reading poems one can pulsate, get involved into the images created by poets.
In this illusion, the heart appears to move and even pulsate as you look around the image.
With the "Coming home" function, the blue light begins to pulsate to indicate that the vehicle is ready and waiting for its driver.
On most nights, especially on weekends, you will find throngs of beautiful people sipping colourful cocktails through long straws, while dance beats pulsate in the background.
